creates.description: Optional file path; the command is skipped when it exists (keeps reruns idempotent)

install_rosetta.description: Set to true to install Rosetta 2 (required for some Intel-based applications on Apple Silicon)

homebrew_taps.description: Homebrew taps to add before installing formulae/casks

homebrew_casks.description: Homebrew cask package names (flat strings, macOS-only format)

homebrew_formulae.description: Homebrew formula package names (flat strings, macOS-only format)

pnpm_global_packages.description: Installed only if pnpm is present

bun_global_packages.description: Installed only if bun is present

git_user_email.description: May be empty; can be set via -e flag instead

git_user_name.description: May be empty or a Jinja2 lookup expression

custom_commands_user.description: Non-elevated shell commands (macOS uses plain strings, unlike Linux platforms)

custom_commands_elevated.description: Elevated (sudo) shell commands (macOS uses plain strings, unlike Linux platforms)

custom_script.description: Path to a custom script run at the end of setup; may be empty
